chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 585 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection/reply at A. 2. For orders on CMA No.2868/2014. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2014 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
